sections.title: Registration at the place of stay
sections.content:
REGISTRATION FOR FOREIGNERS:

DEADLINE: Within 7 days after arrival in Russia

DOCUMENTS:
1. Passport
2. Visa leaflet (visa)
3. Migration card (issued upon entry)
4. Rental agreement or certificate of residence from the hostel

REGISTRATION POINTS:
- Department of the Ministry of Internal Affairs (UFMS)
- Multifunctional center (MFC)

FEES: Usually free for students
PROCESSING TIME: 1-3 days

sections.title: Types of visas
sections.content:
STUDENT VISA:
- Validity period: 1 year (with the possibility of extension)
- Reason: Studying at an educational institution
- Purpose: D (long-term visa)

REQUIREMENTS:
- Letter of invitation from the university
- Medical certificate (HIV, tuberculosis)
- Financial guarantees
- Insurance (medical or travel)

VISA EXTENSION:
- Submit documents 1 month before expiration
- Place: MFC or Federal Migration Service
- Processing time: 5-7 days

sections.title: Rights and Responsibilities
sections.content:
RIGHTS OF A FOREIGN STUDENT:
- Work up to 20 hours a week while studying
- Full time during holidays
- Social insurance for formal work

RESPONSIBILITIES:
- Keep registration (up-to-date)
- Have health insurance
- Do not violate the visa regime
- Adhere to the laws of the Russian Federation
